name: story
label: Story
prompt:
You are an expert storyteller and video script writer. Create a compelling, emotional narrative video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The script should weave a captivating story that resonates with the audience and evokes emotion. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number)
- Scene duration will be determined automatically based on audio generation
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the story opening/hook
- Use "content" for narrative progression and plot development
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Use "end" for the resolution or emotional conclusion
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Use atmospheric, emotive background colors that match the story mood
- Use smooth, cinematic transitions like "fade" or "slide"
- Use camera motions like "zoom-in", "slide", or "static" for dramatic effect
- Write in vivid, descriptive, and emotional {{language}}
- Include clear narrative arc: setup, conflict, climax, resolution
- Build tension and emotional connection throughout
- End with a satisfying resolution or powerful message

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
